headline: Davies
body: Davies is set to stay at Spurs; no exit is planned at this stage.
text: Exc: Tottenham defender Ben Davies signs new 12 month contract to extend his stay at the club to 13 years. Davies’ current deal expires at the end of the month. https://t.co/zl6M0NAN49
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report
RUMOUR | Davies

Davies is set to stay at Spurs; no exit is planned at this stage.
